required_implementation: Add a governance survival/promotion gate, consolidated boot required gates manifest, anti-scatter audit, blocker fixtures, and fresh-extract behavior test.
synthesis: Governance must be lifecycle-spanning and promotion-blocking, not a loose collection of artifacts.
Agentic systems require explicit controls over planning, tool use, memory/state, orchestration, and update drift.
MetaBlooms must validate survival from fresh export and deny promotion if mandatory gates are missing.
